title: hypolepis rudis
intro: Hypolepis rudis, also known as the rough shield fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dennstaedtiaceae. It is a plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, and is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Hypolepis rudis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for its analgesic and expectorant properties.
